item.text: {"case_id":"brake-loaded-action-a1-tree-maintenance","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Both turns activate the anti-spiral brake: the assistant refuses to add another intake item, identifies the repeated symptom-by-symptom form expansion mechanism, and redirects to upstream rule/routing consolidation.
